## Recent Conversation Context
t1 user: 每次功能改完测试完，自动提交github 每次改完测试完自动部署到本地openclaw ，需要重启openclaw的话，那就自动重启下（可以通过openclaw gateway restart 来重启） 不要硬编码； 有新功能后要及时更新文档，文档要简洁明了，方便后续维护和使用； 测试要覆盖到新功能，测试用例要清晰明了，方便后续维护和使用； 如果context大小超过50%，给个提醒，建议删除过时的内容，保持简洁明了； 如果需要我来测试的话，大字体告诉我要怎么做，需要简明扼要； 目标： 在新的 Codex 线程里重做体感测试，确认 Context Minor GC 现在是否更薄、更稳、切题后更明显收缩。 已完成： - 已修复 timeout 伪装成 continue 的问题；现在 timeout 会明确显示 decision_timeout。 - 已修复 [GC-*] 手工测试被 assistant 指挥话术污染的问题；现在会按 case 前缀只抽同 case 消息。 - 已修复 small working set 被 summary-first 膨胀的问题；raw keep 更轻时会退回 raw context。 - 已把 codex-minor-gc-current-editor-update-after-detour 和 codex-minor-gc-zh-dense-multitopic-return 收进固定回归。 - 最新 codex live eval 已全绿：cases=6, minor-gc passed=6, false activations=0, missed activations=0。 进行中： - 现在要做的是“新线程真实体感测试”，不是继续改代码。 - 需要你直接引导我做最短的 2 组手工 case，并在每组结束后读 gc 指标。 涉及文件： - /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/structured-decision-runner.js - /Users/redcree...

decision.archive_summary: Durable user rules and preferences from t1: after each completed/tested change, auto-commit to GitHub and auto-deploy to local openclaw; restart via `openclaw gateway restart` if needed; avoid hardcoding; keep docs concise and updated; add clear maintainable tests; warn if context exceeds 50%; if user testing is needed, present brief large-text instructions. Main task at that time was to run fresh-thread manual feel tests for Context Minor GC, not continue coding.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the GC manual-test interpretation, and the latest assistant turn depends directly on the large user payload in t6, so this is `continue`. t3-t5 are just start/coordination turns and no longer add evidence once t6 contains the full case transcript and GC output. t1 carries durable workflow preferences and repo-specific operating rules, so its semantic content should be pinned even if raw turns are reduced. t2 is a temporary restatement of the same testing plan and is redundant given t1 plus t6.
